privileged_info_summary: The newsletter task uses synthetic data created by the setup_task.sh script with hardcoded diabetes education content about Type 2 diabetes management. The draft document is created programmatically at /home/ga/Documents/diabetes_newsletter_draft.docx with realistic content including disease statistics from the American Diabetes Association. Two metadata values are incomplete or truncated: the expected_footer only lists the organization name 'Harmony Community Health Center' but should include the full footer text with phone '(555) 234-5678' and website 'www.harmonychc.org'; the third article heading is listed as 'Staying Active' but the actual content contains the full heading 'Staying Active: Exercise Tips for Every Ability Level'. The verified output path is /home/ga/Documents/diabetes_newsletter.docx and the task requires formatting with 2 document sections for the mixed single-column header and two-column body layout.
